top_signals.title: SpaceX IPO a Datapoint to Higher Market Prices, Says Julian Emanuel
top_signals.summary: Julian Emanuel, chief equity and quantitative strategist at Evercore ISI, says the melt up has begun as markets remain resilient ahead of the SpaceX IPO “landmark moment.” (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: SpaceX IPO is a ‘referendum’ on Musk, say market watchers
top_signals.summary: Friday's hotly anticipated SpaceX market debut could prove a defining moment for capital markets — and serve as a "referendum" on Elon Musk's leadership.
